title: Conditional Story Generation with Retrieval-Augmented Complex Story Generation and a Forest of Evidence

defines.name: GROVE
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented framework for generating complex and credible stories by retrieving exemplars and iteratively collecting evidence chains to enrich the plot.

problem: Existing LLM prompting methods for conditional story generation often overconstrain the model, making it hard to balance plot complexity with creativity and credibility.
